design.identity: Visual identity for this theme: BOLD POSTER — a magazine cover turned menu: cream paper stock, one loud editorial red, and huge juicy Shrikhand display type set at a slight tilt, like a newsstand poster you can't walk past. The screen title is the masthead — enormous Shrikhand, tilted a degree or two (rotate-1 / -rotate-2), in ink or deep red; sections open with a letterspaced all-caps kicker (small, red, tracking-widest) above a big headline; thin ink rules and column separators organize the page like editorial layout. Body copy, names and prices are set in Archivo. Prices read as bold red editorial numerals directly after the name. When the plan includes photos, treat them as cover shots: large, framed by a thin ink rule or set in a tan panel, caption on solid paper below. DECORATION: there is no pre-supplied background image — author your own editorial furniture as part of the design, drawn as inline SVG in the theme palette: masthead rules above/below the title, corner crop marks, an oversized index numeral or issue-badge circle by section headers, and a tilted red starburst sticker for a highlight. Keep every tilted element padded well inside the canvas edge so nothing clips.
do: The screen title is a masthead: huge Shrikhand, tilted slightly (rotate-1 / -rotate-2 only), dominating the top of the canvas
Letterspaced all-caps red kickers (text-accent-strong, tracking-widest) above section headlines; thin ink rules (border-text) as separators — editorial column rhythm
Prices as bold deep-red numerals (text-price) right after the name, dotted leaders welcome
Reserve big solid red for a few decoration moments (one tilted sticker, masthead rules) so the cream + ink page makes the red land
dont: No dark panels or dark full-bleed backgrounds — the page stays cream paper with ink and red on top
No more than a few degrees of tilt, and never on body text or price columns — tilt is for the masthead and stickers only
No heavy drop shadows or glossy effects — flatness like print; depth comes from scale and rules
No rainbow of accents — red is the only loud colour on the page

motion.name: gallery-fade
motion.description: Cross-fade gallery cycling through cover-shot photos.

components.rule: One masthead per screen, at the very top — the board title set large in Shrikhand ink on the left and the brand name on the right, on a slim content-hugging band of cream paper closed by a thin red rule; no box needed. Identical treatment on every screen of a set; never fabricate a restaurant name, tagline, or operational badge.
Bold red price immediately after the name or across a dotted leader — tabular-nums, always on cream/solid paper.
One per section — a small letterspaced all-caps red kicker above a large ink headline with a thin rule.
Only on unavailable items — a small SOLD OUT slug in muted ink, never red, never competing with available items.
